conectemosPage.title: Contact Us - Iglesia de Cristo Redentor
conectemosPage.description: Get in touch with us. Find our location, activity schedules, and learn how to be part of our community in Buenos Aires.
conectemosPage.keywords: contact, church, Buenos Aires, community, redentor
conectemosPage.ogDescription: Reach out to learn more about our church and how you can be part of our community.

contactCta.title: Join a diverse and loving community, where we get to know Jesus together.

comunidadPage.title: Our Community - Iglesia de Cristo Redentor
comunidadPage.description: Learn more about our community in Buenos Aires. We are a family of faith, united by Christ’s love, and we share our lives in fellowship.
comunidadPage.keywords: community, church, Buenos Aires, faith, christians, redentor
comunidadPage.ogDescription: Discover our community in Buenos Aires, where we live and share Christ’s love together.

homePage.title: Welcome to Iglesia de Cristo Redentor

ourMission.title: Our mission
ourMission.description1: Discover how we live and share Jesus’ love in a way that transforms lives and communities.
ourMission.description2: There’s so much more we want to share with you. Learn more about our mission and how you can be part of this transformation.

quienEsJesusPage.title: Who is Jesus? - Iglesia de Cristo Redentor
quienEsJesusPage.description: Explore who Jesus is, the center of our faith. Discover his message of love, redemption, and hope for all humanity.
quienEsJesusPage.keywords: Jesus, redemption, hope, salvation, Christianity, redentor
quienEsJesusPage.ogDescription: Learn who Jesus is and how his message of love and redemption can transform your life.
